ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geological_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological feature */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the geological feature */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the geological feature */,
  "intersects_bounds" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature intersects spatial boundaries */,
  "percolated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature percolates */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of geological feature */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the geological feature */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the geological feature below the surface */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the geological feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_features_intersects_bounds FOREIGN KEY ("intersects_bounds") REFERENCES spatial_boundaries ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_features_percolated FOREIGN KEY ("percolated") REFERENCES percolation_data ("percolation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological feature */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* Volume value of the feature */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the volume was measured */,
  "volume_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the volume value */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_diameters" (
  "diameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diameter entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological feature */,
  "diameter_value" REAL /* Diameter value of the feature */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the diameter was measured */,
  "diameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the diameter value */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the diameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial boundary */,
  "boundary_name" TEXT /* Name of the spatial boundary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spatial boundary */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of spatial boundary */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the spatial boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percolation_data" (
  "percolation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percolation data entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological feature */,
  "percolation_rate" REAL /* Percolation rate of the feature */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the percolation rate was measured */,
  "percolation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the percolation rate */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the percolation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percolation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was integrated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the external data */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_accessed_feature" INTEGER /* ID of the geological feature most recently accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geological feature being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the geological feature */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device, etc.) used to access the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES geological_features ("feature_id")
)
